strings.panel.p2.bubble.left.html: C'mon, don't I deserve a kiss?
strings.panel.p3.bubble.right.html: Radd, this is a pre-programmed scene of the game. We can't change it.
strings.panel.p4.bubble.right.html: If I didn't kiss you the first time, I won't kiss you the second, third, or thirty-third time.
